text: As used in this article, “antisiphoning device” means a device which prevents the removal by suction of fuel from a motor vehicle.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 5. Other Equipment [27000 - 28160]
#### Article 16. Methanol or Ethanol Fueled Vehicles [28110 - 28114]
##### § 28110

As used in this article, “antisiphoning device” means a device which prevents the removal by suction of fuel from a motor vehicle.

*(Added by Stats. 1989, Ch. 1301, Sec. 1.)*

subsections.text: As used in this article, “antisiphoning device” means a device which prevents the removal by suction of fuel from a motor vehicle.
